data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified against description: (1) Rolling last-24h view: applyFilters uses Date.now()-based cutoff with preset precedence over manual dates — correct and tested (10 filter tests). (2) Combined all-steps success-rate series: buildCombinedSeries aggregates across all queue types by agent with proper success/(success+fail) calculation — tested (5 tests). (3) Per-step leaderboard summaries: buildLeaderboard ranks agents by success rate with volume tiebreaker and calculates margin in pp — tested (4 tests). (4) Existing date-range behavior preserved: manual dateFrom/dateTo path unchanged, preset path is additive. TypeScript clean, no lint issues in changed files, all 2237 tests pass.
